original_image_tags: Close-up of a brown paper folder or envelope flap. A large, dark ink-stamped or handwritten number "78078" is visible on the right side.

elements.description: The back of a brown paper folder. There is handwritten text at the top edge: 'Carol Rosin and Stan Cypher' followed by '4/30/2001'. There is a large printed or stamped number '78078' in black ink on the right side of the folder.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (brown paper folder, stamped number '78078'), but Description B adds handwritten text at the top edge that Description A does not mention, creating a non-contradictory detail difference.
